name: Ensure Anti-DDoS access and security log service is enabled
description: Anti-DDoS access and security log service is disabled.
body:
### Control intent

This control verifies that **anti-DDoS access and security log service is enabled** in Alibaba Cloud.

### Signal reviewed

The assessment checks for anti-DDoS access and security log service is disabled. and highlights environments where security telemetry or alerting coverage is incomplete.

### Why it is operationally important

Security teams need reliable telemetry before an incident starts. Missing audit logs, weak retention, or absent alerts can make investigation, evidence collection, and response timelines materially worse.

This control maps to a benchmark-style requirement, so the expected state should match the benchmark wording unless your organization has an approved exception.
remediationDescription:
### Alibaba Cloud

1. Open the Alibaba Cloud console and go to Anti-DDoS.
2. Select the Anti-DDoS instance or protected asset group used by the affected account.
3. Open the Logs, Security Logs, or Log Analysis section for the service edition in use.
4. Enable access logs and security event logs.
5. Select the target Log Service project and Logstore, or create them if they do not exist.
6. Set a retention period that matches the organization's incident investigation requirements.
7. Generate or wait for protected traffic, then confirm logs are visible in Log Service.

Reference: https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/anti-ddos/
